assertionResults.evidence: AGENTS.md contains only critical rule reinforcements (order/payment separation, QRIS exec, forbidden words), cross-references to 5 files, data structure paths, and sinkronisasi summary. No lengthy explanations. Removed detailed flow explanations, payment rules, and sync details that now live in SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md.
wc -w AGENTS.md = 237 words. 36% reduction from ~370 words. Confirmed by handoff verification.
All 5 referenced files exist: SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md, MEMORY.md, ORDER_SYNC.md, menu-schema.json, TOOLS.md. Verified with ls -la.

No contradictions found between AGENTS.md and SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md. Order/payment separation (TERPISAH), QRIS exec procedure, forbidden words list, and data structure paths all align. Payment rules consistent: Pickup QRIS mandatory, Delivery QRIS/COD.

Forbidden words (backend, state, sync, curl, exec, API, endpoint, approve, error, localhost) appear only in: (1) the forbidden words list itself, (2) file path references (state/orders-active, endpoint backend), (3) agent instruction sections (exec curl). No forbidden words appear in example customer-facing responses or templates.
All cross-references valid: SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md, MEMORY.md, ORDER_SYNC.md, menu-schema.json, TOOLS.md all exist.

codeReview.summary: AGENTS.md restructured successfully from ~370 to 237 words (-36%). Removed `<coding_guidelines>` wrapper. Removed detailed flow explanations, payment rules, and sync details that now live in SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md. Kept only critical rule reinforcements (order/payment separation, QRIS exec, forbidden words), file cross-references, data structure paths, and minimal sinkronisasi note. All critical rules present: TUNGGU/TERPISAH (2 matches), exec (3 matches), terlarang/JANGAN (3 matches). No contradictions with SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md.

summary: Feature restructure-agents-md passes all validation assertions. AGENTS.md reduced from ~370 to 237 words (-36%) while retaining all critical rule reinforcements and valid cross-references. No contradictions with SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md. Forbidden words appear only in technical instruction contexts, not in customer-facing content. Worker followed config-worker skill procedure correctly.
